summary: Excellent soundboard recording with a jazzy, stretched‑out vibe and an all‑time killer Help > Slipknot > Franklin’s sequence
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear sound and the mellow, jazz‑inflected feel of this show. The highlight is the Help > Slipknot > Franklin’s Tower, described as an “all‑time keeper,” and a short, sweet drum solo adds extra flavor.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews praise both the musical performance (standout Help sequence, jazzy feel) and the excellent soundboard quality, leading to a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the sound “extremely nice” and “very nice,” noting clear, crisp audio with no reported issues.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as stretched out like taffy – relaxed, jazzy, and mellow rather than tight, with a notable drum solo in the middle.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His “fingers” are praised as outstanding, indicating superb guitar work.
band_member_comments.Drums: A short, sweet drum solo is highlighted positively.
